name: Neuraxis, INC
business: Neuraxis, Inc. is a medical technology company that develops and sells neuromodulation therapies for gastrointestinal disorders, primarily its IB-Stim device for pediatric functional abdominal pain and its RED device for adult chronic constipation. The company sells to healthcare providers including children's hospitals, adult gastroenterologists, and pain physicians.

exposures.sentence: Neuraxis, Inc. is a first-to-market growth-stage medical technology company focused on neuromodulation therapies for chronic and debilitating conditions in gastrointestinal (GI) digestive system.

catalysts.event: Category I CPT Code (64567) for PENFS becomes effective
catalysts.sentence: The finalized Category I CPT Code for PENFS, 64567 and associated valuations, was publicly announced in Q4 of 2025. CPT 64567 became effective for utilization and reporting PENFS procedures on January 1, 2026.

In December 2025, NeurAxis was awarded a FSS contract with the United States government which includes the 01-1020 IB-Stim to be sold for the FDA indications of Functional Abdominal Pain with IBS, Functional Dyspepsia (FD), and associated FD Nausea Symptoms.

tamClaims.claim: Pediatrics industry has multi-billion-dollar market opportunities.
tamClaims.sentence: The pediatrics industry has multi-billion-dollar market opportunities.
